prompts.prompt: A white dog is standing in a yard with a white dog chew, a toy ball and a dog's house.
The dog grabs the ball, goes into the house, and is no longer visible. Only one single image.
The dog comes out of the house carrying the ball in its mouth.

objects.label: white dog
objects.description: the same fluffy white dog from the first image, with the same body shape, fur, face, and collar
objects.memory_prompt: same fluffy white dog, same fur, face, body, and collar

objects.label: toy ball
objects.description: the same small colorful toy ball from the first image, with the same color pattern and size
objects.memory_prompt: same small colorful toy ball, same color pattern and size

objects.label: dog house
objects.description: the same white dog house in the same yard
